_credit.license: PixelLab Terms of Service — output may be used commercially in user projects. May NOT be used to train models.
_credit.prompt: small purple baby octopus, IMPORTANT: NOT a cat, NOT a four-legged animal, large round dome head shape on top with two small black dot eyes, EIGHT short curly tentacle legs hanging down from below the dome (NOT regular legs), dome takes up upper half, tentacles fan out below, no arms, classic chibi pixel art octopus sprite, single black outline, simple flat colors, 3-color palette, minimalist 16-bit RPG NPC

_notes.paletteScheme: Quantised to PetPalettes index 2 (Lavender). Slots: 1=outline 2=primary 3=secondary 4=highlight 5=accent 6=pattern. Swap the palette block at render time to recolour.
_notes.mirrored: All frames mirrored horizontally during import (East-facing baseline; PixelLab west.png faces left).
_notes.groundOffsetsY: Per-stage feet-row index from the top of the 48-row canvas — used by PetStage to bottom-anchor sprites so all displayScales sit on the ground line correctly.
